{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Black Fire Fierce Outer Robe
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Black Fire Fierce Outer Robe]] is a legendary [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
